watch_reasons: Retained. Xiamen Tungsten is not a pure miner but tungsten is globally supply-concentrated and China applies mining quota controls. calibrated_standard_implications: For tungsten retain differentiated companies when resource constraint; quota control; high-value processing; and strong step-level margins are all present. Pure mining status is not required if the processing moat is resource-backed.

peer_groups: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
watch_reasons: Retained. China Tungsten High-Tech has stronger company-level evidence than a normal material processor. Its annual report describes Shizhuyuan as the world's largest single operating tungsten mine and public disclosures identify its cemented-carbide scale as global No. 1. Margins and R&D intensity are acceptable for high-end tungsten materials.
calibrated_standard_implications: Keep both Xiamen Tungsten and China Tungsten High-Tech because they are differentiated. Xiamen Tungsten is an integrated tungsten-molybdenum and material platform while China Tungsten High-Tech is a hard-alloy tooling and Shizhuyuan-backed tungsten platform.
